TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mahavun (Mamahavunna, 久美部落) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 943 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 830 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Cou 15%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: alaŋ maħa*un (mamaħa*unna, ****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%.
S.FORM: alang Mahavun (Mamahavunna, 久美部落) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 943 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 830 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Cou 15%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: alaŋ maħa*un (mamaħa*unna, ****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%.
